figures_detected.description: Power steering reservoir assembly showing the reservoir unit with mounting bracket and hose stubs
Power steering reservoir installed in engine bay with callout label identifying the power steering reservoir

steps.text: Slacken hose retaining clips and remove feed and return hoses from reservoir.
Remove Bolts (3) securing reservoir to vehicle body.

content_blocks.text:
CAUTION
• Do not remove reservoir from bracket or rotate reservoir in bracket.
• If it is necessary to separate reservoir from bracket ensure it is orientated as disassembled when re-assembling. Note correct orientation and connection of feed and return hoses to reservoir stub pipes.

steps.text: Installation is the reverse procedure to removal.
Ensure hoses are fitted to reservoir correctly and do not interfere with drive belts.
Refill reservoir as described in installation procedure of power steering rack and check fluid level after bleeding hydraulic system.
